title: Empty Persons column
excerpt: How do I empty a people or person column? I can’t find any documentation (or forum posts) for this. Thanks in advance.

posts.author: bevoid (Ric)
posts.cookedHtml: How do I empty a people or person column? I can’t find any documentation (or forum posts) for this. Thanks in advance.

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @bevoid

Instructions to clear a column can be found here - https://monday.com/developers/v2#column-values-section-removing-values

Here’s an example of an API call that clears the people/person column:

mutation {
  change_column_value (board_id: 628247145, item_id: 628251486, column_id: "people", value: "{}") {
    id
  }
}

-Scott

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hola @bevoid,

Just wanted to follow up here. My original comment was incorrect - I’ve since updated it with the relevant API call.

Apologies for any confusion

-Scott
